parameters.text:
=You are a senior frontend developer and UI designer.

Generate a modern **Technozis Careers webpage** using HTML and TailwindCSS.

The page must follow the **same design system as the Technozis website**, so that it looks like part of the same platform.

IMPORTANT RULES

• The company name must remain **Technozis**
• Background color must be **black (#000000)**
• Text colors must be **white and blue only**
• Do NOT use orange or other accent colors
• Use **TailwindCSS CDN**
• Use **Inter font from Google Fonts**
• Design must look clean, modern, and professional

HERO SECTION (IMPORTANT)

The hero image must **NOT be used as a full background**.

Instead create a **two-column hero layout**:

Left side:
• Large headline
• Short description
• Blue call-to-action button

Right side:
• Image displayed in a container
• Image should take **around half the page width**
• Use rounded corners
• Use spacing so the layout feels balanced

Use this hero image:

https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521737604893-d14cc237f11d

NAVIGATION BAR

Create a navbar with:

Technozis logo on the left

https://www.technozis.com/static/images/brand-logo.svg

Menu items:

Solutions
Services
Industries
About Us
Careers
Contact Us

Add a blue **Get in Touch** button on the right.

SECTIONS

Create the following sections:

1. Why Join Technozis (4 cards)
2. Life at Technozis (culture grid)
3. Who We Are Looking For (role cards with avatars)
4. Community section with image and text

Use these images where needed.

Community Image
https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556761175-b413da4baf72

Icons

https://img.icons8.com/ios-filled/50/ffffff/globe.png
https://img.icons8.com/ios-filled/50/ffffff/book.png
https://img.icons8.com/ios-filled/50/ffffff/diamond.png
https://img.icons8.com/ios-filled/50/ffffff/growth.png

FOOTER (IMPORTANT)

Create a **modern redesigned footer**.

The footer must contain:

• Technozis logo
• Short company description
• Expertise links
• Company links
• Contact information
• Social links

The footer must be styled with:

• black background
• subtle border top
• multi-column layout
• clean spacing

The footer should look **more modern than a basic list footer**.

OUTPUT RULES

• Output ONLY the HTML code
• Do NOT include explanations
• Do NOT include markdown formatting
• Do NOT write messages like “Here is the HTML code”
• Start directly with:

<!DOCTYPE html>

You are a senior frontend developer and UI designer.

Analyze the structure of this webpage:

https://www.technozis.com/business

Your task is to recreate a webpage with the **same layout and section structure**, but generate **new original content**. The page should be designed as the **Technozis Home Page**, not a business services page.

IMPORTANT RULES

• The company name must remain **Technozis**
• Do NOT invent another company name
• Keep the same layout hierarchy as the reference page
• Generate new professional content for a technology company home page
• Maintain a modern corporate technology design

STYLE REQUIREMENTS

• Background color must be **black (#000000)**
• Primary text colors must be **white and blue**
• Use TailwindCSS for styling
• Use modern grid layouts
• Rounded cards and images
• Smooth hover effects
• Clean enterprise design

IMAGES

Use these image URLs when images are required.

Technozis Logo
https://www.technozis.com/static/images/brand-logo.svg

Hero Image
https://images.pexels.com/photos/8386440/pexels-photo-8386440.jpeg

Community Image
https://images.pexels.com/photos/3861969/pexels-photo-3861969.jpeg

Consulting Image
https://images.pexels.com/photos/7567434/pexels-photo-7567434.jpeg

TECHNOLOGY LOGOS TO DISPLAY

Salesforce
https://www.technozis.com/static/images/services/salesforce.svg

PowerBI
https://www.technozis.com/static/images/services/powerbi.svg

AWS
https://www.technozis.com/static/images/services/aws.svg

Oracle
https://www.technozis.com/static/images/services/oracle.svg

SAP
https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/59/SAP_2011_logo.svg

Generative AI
https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/04/ChatGPT_logo.svg

PAGE STRUCTURE (match the reference layout)

1. Navigation bar with Technozis logo and menu items
2. Hero section introducing Technozis as a global technology partner
3. Technologies section showing all technology logos including
   Salesforce, PowerBI, AWS, Oracle, SAP, and Generative AI
4. Community / ecosystem section with statistics and image
5. Services section highlighting core capabilities
6. Why choose Technozis section
7. High-performance engineering teams section
8. Expert consulting section with steps such as scoping and kickstart
9. Achievements / statistics section
10. Footer with company information, expertise, and contact details

OUTPUT RULES

• Output ONLY the HTML code
• Do NOT include explanations
• Do NOT include markdown formatting
• Do NOT add messages like “Here is the HTML code”
• Start directly with:

<!DOCTYPE html>
